# kemp_delete_header_rule (Data Source)

Reads a system-level delete-header rule by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "kemp_delete_header_rule" "existing" {
  name = "remove-server-header"
}

output "pattern" {
  value = data.kemp_delete_header_rule.existing.pattern
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Rule name.

### Read-Only

- `only_on_flag` (Number)
- `only_on_no_flag` (Number)
- `pattern` (String) Pattern matching the header value to delete.
